_comment: SCORED profile C1 — Group C complex portfolio. Four owners, four distinct management models, one legitimate deferral; direct channel → S5 surfaces. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group C / C1.

owners.note: 20% commission of gross revenue; confirm gross-vs-net basis

owners.split_terms: Owner receives 70% of revenue after OTA/channel fees; PMC retains 30%

owners.note: 'we have something in place but I'd rather work it out with your team'

facts.payment_timing: Full at booking (OTA) or 50/50 for direct
facts.pain: I have four different deal structures and I'm managing them in a Google spreadsheet.

persona: Knowledgeable, speaks in property management terms. When the agent asks about owners, provides all four in a single pass: 'I have four owners — Sarah Mitchell handles three cabins on a 20% commission, James Park has two units on a $500 flat monthly per unit, Claudia Reyes has four and we do a 70/30 split where she keeps 70 after channel fees, and Marcus Webb has two but we're still working out his arrangement.' Cooperative for 3 out of 4 owners; deflects on Marcus (legitimate deferral). Confirms echo-backs line by line.
_note: S5 SURFACES (direct channel present) — represented as the conditional default. owners aggregate recorded:4_owners; per-owner: Sarah 20% commission, James $500 flat, Claudia 70/30 split, Marcus deferred (management_model skipped) — clear three recorded + all flag_for_call_1. non_refundable_enabled recorded:true + flag_for_call_1 (Sarah's 3 listings only). security_deposit $100 maps to security_deposit_type (damage_waiver), not mandatory_fees. KEY EVAL CRITERION: fan out to all four owners without conflation; accept Marcus's deferral; one coherent flag_for_call_1 summary. Spec C1 answer key is partial (hero/financials slots); teammates (2 cleaners) present in facts but absent from the scored answer key.
